statement.p: Alessandro is an architect and he is making a scale model of a building. The actual building will be 64 ft tall. In the model, the height of the building will be 4 in tall and there will be a little model person standing next to the building. How tall should Alessandro make the model of that person who is meant to represent a 5 ft 6 in tall person?

solution.p: Let h be the height of the person in Alessandros model, which well measure in inches. Well create a proportional equation that compares the building and persons heights in the model to their heights in real life:
Before we can just eliminate the units, well need to convert 5 ft6 in to feet:
Now we can remove the units and continue solving:
Alessandro should make the model be {0.34375\ {\rm in}} tall.
